title: Acknowledgment of Corporate Investor. The LMA shall, within thirty (30)
content: 19 calendar days from the transfer of shares to a corporate investor, submit the required 20 documents to the Department for acknowledgement of the corporate investor and 21 updating of its shareholdings. 22 23
